notes: Vendor hint site rootsatpettittdental.com matches the doctor's name but lists phone 312-565-4002 (not the record's 312-996-7546) and shows no street address on its homepage — fails the address/phone corroboration rule. A separate site (kenwooddentalgroup.com) shows the same doctor now practicing at a wholly different address (1335 E 87th St, Chicago IL 60619) and phone (773-819-7150) — she may have relocated, but this does not corroborate the record's 155 N Harbor Dr location either. A search briefly associated the record's phone number with 'Chicago Dental 312,' but a direct fetch of chicagodental312.com showed a different current phone (312-263-5090) and address (25 E Washington St), so that lead could not be confirmed and is NOT treated as a confirmed successor. No site could be corroborated by address or phone.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Jordan Kushner and Dr. Richard Becker currently run the practice; Dr. Alan Kushner founded it in 1994 and is now retired (Jordan is his son).
notes: Exact address (205 N Michigan Ave Ste 2214, Chicago IL 60601) and exact phone (312) 819-1460 confirmed on the practice's own site. Small independent family-run practice (not a DSO/chain). No careers or hiring link found on the homepage or staff page.

Vendor hint domain madachicago.com is, per third-party search-engine snippets and directory listings, historically Michigan Avenue Dental Associates' site at 122 S Michigan Ave Ste 1212, Chicago IL 60603 (matches record) with phone (312) 922-9595. However 2 direct WebFetch loads (homepage, and /contact which 404'd) returned unrelated Indonesian-language blog/gaming content, not dental content — the domain now appears dead/parked/repurposed and does not itself show the record's address or phone. BBB also flags the business as possibly no longer in business. Because the live site fails to corroborate address or phone directly (only stale third-party aggregators like Yelp/Facebook still show it), this cannot be verified as a usable current website.

owner_operator_stated: Team led by Dr. Alexander Reznikov, alongside Dr. Konstantin Gromov, Dr. Elizabeth Kellogg, and Dr. Irene Skirius.
notes: Exact phone match (312) 588-0043 and address 1556 S Michigan Ave Ste 200, Chicago IL 60605 confirmed via search-engine indexing of the practice's own site plus Yelp corroboration; 3 direct WebFetch attempts on the site itself (homepage, /contact, /meet-our-doctors) all returned HTTP 403 (bot-blocked), so page content could not be loaded directly, but the address/phone/doctor-roster facts appeared in search results actually seen. A separate search surfaced an unconfirmed indication the practice may be hiring a dental assistant, but no specific careers-page URL could be located/loaded, so no openings are listed and has_hiring_page is false. Independent multi-dentist group practice, no DSO brand indicated.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Lena J. Casimir owns and operates Classic Smiles (women-owned practice).
notes: Street address match confirmed (850 S Wabash Ave Ste 290, Chicago IL 60605) via search-engine indexing of the practice's own site; direct WebFetch failed with TLS certificate errors on 3 separate attempts (http and https, 2 paths), so no page could be loaded directly. Current listed phone (312) 922-3411 differs from the record's (312) 356-4700 across every source checked — likely a phone-number change over time at the same address/entity rather than a successor practice; no evidence of a different practice occupying this address was found. Solo independent practice.

Dr. Allen J. Moses retired from clinical practice at 233 S Wacker Dr (Willis Tower) in 2015 per multiple aggregator listings. His current live site (themoses.com / mosesappliances.com) covers only his sleep-apnea oral-appliance product line and does not list the record's street address or phone number anywhere on the fetched page — fails corroboration on name alone. Searched directly for a successor dental practice at 233 S Wacker Dr Ste LL1-050 in Willis Tower; found only unrelated dental offices at different Wacker Dr addresses (e.g., Setty Dental Group at 223 W Jackson Blvd), so no confirmed successor entity exists — not classified as ownership_conflict, just an apparently defunct solo practice with no usable current website.
